notes: v1.14.113 - FIX deploy dashboard 'frozen' after in-frame actions (HEALTH B2 / mandate Stage 3a, pulled forward as a live field bug). showOpsTab hardcoded its render host to the legacy #ops-content (hidden under body.rd), so completing a job / running an audit / opening SOPs from the redesign deploy dashboard rendered off-screen = dashboard looked frozen. Now routes through the existing deploy_opsHost() resolver (returns #wk-deploy under redesign, #ops-content under legacy) EXCEPT for the un-homed ops-tabs (rackmap/bom/manifest/portmap/crashcart) which have no redesign home yet (Stage 3b) and are kept on #ops-content - this is the SCOPED variant: the classify gate caught a redesign-reachable showOpsTab('rackmap') caller (the Rack Map button in deploy_showList @22870 that the LEDGER missed), so the un-homed tabs are excluded to avoid punching an un-styled surface into the dashboard. burndown/audits/sops now land in-frame. Legacy byte-identical (all tabs -> #ops-content under legacy). One-line host swap + un-homed guard; no CSS, no markup, no new functions. DEVICE-VERIFY: complete job / run audit / Suggested SOPs render in-dashboard not frozen; Rack Map button unchanged (still off-screen pending 3b); ?legacy=1 byte-identical.
